Package com.sunilos.p4.ctl

Class BaseReportCtl<B extends BaseBean>

java.lang.Object
jakarta.servlet.GenericServlet
jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
com.sunilos.p4.ctl.BaseReportCtl<B>
Type Parameters:
B - the bean type whose instances populate the report data source; must extend BaseBean
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.servlet.Servlet, jakarta.servlet.ServletConfig, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
CollegeReportCtl, CourseReportCtl, FacultyReportCtl, InsuranceReportCtl, MarksheetReportCtl, RoleReportCtl, StudentReportCtl, SubjectReportCtl, UserReportCtl
public abstract class BaseReportCtl<B extends BaseBean> extends jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
Abstract base servlet for JasperReports-based list reports.

Subclasses implement three methods to produce a fully functional report servlet: getList() supplies the data, getView() points to the JRXML template, and getCompiledReportKey() provides the ServletContext cache key so the template is compiled only once per application lifecycle.

Supports two output formats selected via the type request parameter:

  • type=pdf (default) â€” inline PDF via JasperExportManager
  • type=doc â€” OOXML Word document via JRDocxExporter
Version:
1.0
Author:
Deepak Vishwakarma
See Also:

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    doGet(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response)
    Handles GET requests by fetching the data list, determining the requested output format from the type parameter (defaults to "pdf"), and delegating to generateReport(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse, java.util.List<B>, java.lang.String, java.lang.String).
    protected void
    doPost(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response)
    Delegates POST requests to doGet(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse), so the report can be triggered from either a link or a form submission.
    private void
    generateReport(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response, List<B> list, String reportTemplatePath, String reportType)
    Fills the compiled report with list as its data source and writes the output to the HTTP response.
    net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JasperReport
    getCompiledReport(String reportTemplatePath)
    Returns the compiled JasperReport for the given JRXML path, compiling it on the first call and caching the result in the ServletContext under getCompiledReportKey().
    abstract String
    getCompiledReportKey()
    Returns the unique key used to cache the compiled JasperReport in the ServletContext.
    abstract List<B>
    getList()
    Fetches and returns the list of beans that will be used as the report data source.
    abstract String
    getView()
    Returns the classpath-relative path to the JRXML report template.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseReportCtl

      public BaseReportCtl()

  • Method Details

    • getView

      public abstract String getView()
      Returns the classpath-relative path to the JRXML report template. Example: "/reports/CourseListReport.jrxml"
      Returns:
      non-null path to the JRXML resource

    • getCompiledReportKey

      public abstract String getCompiledReportKey()
      Returns the unique key used to cache the compiled JasperReport in the ServletContext. Example: "COURSE_LIST_COMPILED_REPORT"
      Returns:
      non-null, application-unique cache key

    • getList

      public abstract List<B> getList()
      Fetches and returns the list of beans that will be used as the report data source. Called once per request.
      Returns:
      non-null list of beans; may be empty

    • getCompiledReport

      public net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JasperReport getCompiledReport(String reportTemplatePath) throws Exception
      Returns the compiled JasperReport for the given JRXML path, compiling it on the first call and caching the result in the ServletContext under getCompiledReportKey(). Thread-safe: synchronizes on the ServletContext to prevent duplicate compilation under concurrent first requests.
      Parameters:
      reportTemplatePath - classpath-relative path to the JRXML file
      Returns:
      compiled report ready for filling
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the JRXML resource cannot be located
      Exception - if JasperReports compilation fails

    • generateReport

      private void generateReport(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response, List<B> list, String reportTemplatePath, String reportType) throws Exception
      Fills the compiled report with list as its data source and writes the output to the HTTP response. The reportType parameter selects the export format: "pdf" produces an inline PDF and "doc" produces an OOXML Word document.
      Parameters:
      response - the HTTP response to write the report into
      list - the data to populate the report
      reportTemplatePath - classpath-relative path to the JRXML file
      reportType - "pdf" or "doc"
      Throws:
      Exception - if report filling or export fails

    • doGet

      protected void doGet(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response) throws jakarta.servlet.ServletException, IOException
      Handles GET requests by fetching the data list, determining the requested output format from the type parameter (defaults to "pdf"), and delegating to generateReport(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse, java.util.List<B>, java.lang.String, java.lang.String).
      Overrides:
      doGet in class jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
      Parameters:
      request - the HTTP request; reads optional type parameter
      response - the HTTP response the report is written to
      Throws:
      jakarta.servlet.ServletException - if report generation fails
      IOException - if the response output stream cannot be written

    • doPost

      protected void doPost(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response) throws jakarta.servlet.ServletException, IOException
      Delegates POST requests to doGet(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse), so the report can be triggered from either a link or a form submission.
      Overrides:
      doPost in class jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
      Parameters:
      request - the HTTP request
      response - the HTTP response
      Throws:
      jakarta.servlet.ServletException - if report generation fails
      IOException - if the response output stream cannot be written
